tools.name: get_font_info
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific web font including variants, subsets, tags, designer, year, and Google Fonts URL.

tools.name: suggest_pairings
tools.description: Get font pairing recommendations with CSS snippets, compatibility scores, and curated rationale from design experts.

tools.name: generate_css
tools.description: Generate ready-to-use CSS @import snippet for a single font or a heading+body font pairing.

tools.name: list_fonts_by_category
tools.description: List available web fonts filtered by category, tag, or search query. Returns 100+ fonts across serif, sans-serif, monospace, display, and handwriting categories.

tools.name: check_language_support
tools.description: Check which languages/scripts a font supports, or verify support for specific language codes.

tools.name: font_stack
tools.description: Generate a complete CSS font-stack with metric-compatible and system fallbacks for robust cross-platform rendering.
